app.name: Developer Portfolio Website
app.one_liner: A modern, responsive developer portfolio showcasing skills, projects, and career journey with dynamic GitHub integration and interactive UI elements.

screens.name: Main Portfolio Screen
screens.purpose: Display the developer's personal brand, career timeline, technical skills, certifications, blog highlights, and project portfolio with live GitHub data.

rust_commands.name: fetch_github_projects
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch live project data from GitHub API using configured credentials.

mvp_plan: week 1: Configure Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui
week 1: Implement responsive layout for all screen sizes
week 1: Set up Vite + React + TypeScript base
acceptance_tests: GitHub project data appears dynamically when valid VITE_GITHUB_TOKEN and VITE_GITHUB_USERNAME are provided.
The site loads correctly on a 320px wide mobile device.
